mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS "userId", username, password_hash AS "passwordHash", display_name AS "displayName", role, enabled, created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT u.user_id AS "userId", u.username, u.display_name AS "displayName", u.role, u.enabled, s.expires_at AS "expiresAt" FROM user_login_session s JOIN app_user u ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE s.token = #{token}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_login_session( token, user_id, expires_at, created_at, last_seen_at ) VALUES ( #{token}, #{userId}, #{expiresAt}, #{now}, #{now} )
